notes: Nansen is an on-chain analytics platform. It does NOT provide a public trader leaderboard. It provides wallet labels, smart money tracking, and portfolio analytics. Used as enrichment data source ONLY.

enrichment_endpoints.notes: Returns labels for an address: 'Smart Money', 'Fund', 'DEX Trader', etc.

roi_sort_notes: Nansen does not have a leaderboard. It provides wallet analytics.

7d.reason: Nansen is not a leaderboard platform

enrichment_use_cases: Label wallets that appear on DEX leaderboards (GMX/dYdX/Hyperliquid)
Identify 'Smart Money' addresses for trust scoring
Cross-reference wallet portfolios for risk assessment

rate_limits.notes: Paid API. Free tier very limited. Enterprise tier: higher limits.

cost: Paid API subscription required. Standard plan ~$150/mo for API access.
implementation_priority: Phase 4 - enrichment layer after core leaderboards work
